zh.doc_title: 清境觀星園景觀山莊 | 海拔2106公尺的雲端際會
zh.hero_title:
擁抱合歡群峰
漫步雲端星空下
zh.about_p1: 觀星園座落於台14甲線旁，海拔 2106 公尺，是清境最高的景觀山莊。這裡遠離公路噪音，全年平均氣溫約 16℃，讓您在純淨無污染的清新空氣中，感受大自然瞬息萬變的神奇。
zh.about_p2: 我們的每間客房均設有 180 度觀景陽台，足以飽覽合歡山、奇萊山、能高山及玉山群峰的壯麗。不論是清晨翻騰的雲海霧瀑，或是入夜後璀璨的月影繁星，山明雲秀的絕景盡收眼底。
zh.about_p3: 山莊鄰近台大梅峰農場，距台灣公路最高點「武嶺」僅 19 公里。近旁更有 立鷹峰原始森林步道，步行一圈約 40～60 分鐘，是您健行探幽、賞鳥觀景，享受芬多精森林浴的絕佳路徑。
zh.about_card1_d: 對望合歡、奇萊、能高與玉山群峰，180度視野無遮蔽。
zh.about_card2_d: 備有大型停車場，位於清境草原上方 2 公里，前行 3 公里即達梅峰農場。
zh.about_card3_d: 結合探幽、賞鳥、觀賞奇花野草，提供最高品質的高山放鬆享受。
zh.about_construction: [ 新官網建置中，將陸續補齊功能。目前已可使用線上訂房表單，送出後請留意Email回覆！ ]
zh.room_8_f: 特色：設有兩間獨立衛浴
zh.room_fam_f: 特色：空間最寬敞，採光優異
zh.room_add_9: 加床：最多加 1 床 (至 9 位)
zh.extra_bed_notice: ※ 請注意各房型加床上限，為維護住宿品質，恕無法提供超過上限之加床服務。
zh.check_in: 進房時間：下午 2:30 以後
zh.check_out: 退房時間：上午 10:30 以前
zh.remit_1: 訂房訂金請匯款房價之 1/2。
zh.remit_2: 請於訂房後 【三天內】 完成匯款，並以電話或 Email 確認手續。
zh.remit_3: 確認時請註明：預訂房型、日期、姓名、聯絡電話。
zh.remit_4: 逾期未確認或每日 17:00 前未完成確認者，本園保有取消權利。
zh.refund_t: 取消入住退還訂金比例
zh.refund_law: 依據南投縣政府「府觀管字第1020010092號函」辦理：
zh.ref_0: 入住當天通知或未入住者
zh.food_br_d: 住宿房客均由山莊悉心準備，附贈美味的西式早餐。
zh.food_din_notice: ※ 僅供房客預訂，請最遲於入住前一天預訂
zh.hot_extra_d: 添加各式火鍋料：$100 / 份
zh.tra_r1_t: 首選路線：直達埔里快速路線 (經國道 6 號)
zh.tra_r1_d: 國道三號（中二高） → 霧峰系統接 國道 6 號 → 終點交流道左轉 → 走省道台 14 線（往霧社）→ 經霧社、清境農場、青青草原 → 台 14 甲線 12.4K 處 右側上坡轉彎爬坡 → 觀星園景觀山莊。
zh.tra_r2_t: 若國道 6 號壅塞時之替代路線
zh.tra_r2_d: 自國道三號（二高）草屯交流道下 → 直接行駛省道 台 14 線（中潭公路） → 經草屯、國姓、埔里 → 接續往霧社、清境農場方向前行。
zh.tra_bus_d: 從 台中高鐵站 / 台中火車站 搭乘客運往埔里總站，再轉乘南投客運往清境農場方向。
zh.tra_pickup_d: 部分班次（台灣好行）可直達清境，請務必於 「松崗站」 下車，並來電通知山莊，我們將前往接駁。
zh.footer_slogan: 清境最高視野 ‧ 觀星園
zh.footer_addr: 南投縣仁愛鄉大同村博望巷96號
zh.footer_copy: © 2026 清境觀星園景觀山莊 | 新官網建置中
zh.book_subtitle: 填寫後我們將儘速與您聯繫確認訂房狀況
zh.book_privacy: 送出後即表示同意本山莊之訂房規定與隱私條款
zh.book_notes_placeholder: 例如：食物過敏、是否需要接駁等...

en.doc_title: Starry House | Meeting in the clouds at 2106m
en.hero_title:
Embrace Hehuan Peaks
Strolling Through The Stars, High Above The Clouds
en.about_title: Beyond the Clouds, the Ultimate Stargazing.
en.about_p1: Starry House is located at 2106 meters altitude, the highest landscape villa in Cingjing. Away from traffic noise, with an average annual temperature of 16℃, feel the magic of nature in pure air.
en.about_p2: Every room features a 180-degree balcony with views of Hehuan, Qilai, and Jade Mountain peaks. Whether it's the morning sea of clouds or nighttime stars, the scenery is breathtaking.
en.about_p3: Near NTU Meifeng Farm, only 19km from 'Wuling' (Taiwan's highest highway point). The Liying Peak Forest Trail nearby offers a perfect 40-60 min hike for nature and bird watching.
en.about_card1_d: 180° unobstructed view of Hehuan, Qilai, and Jade Mountain peaks.
en.about_card2_d: Large parking lot. 2km above Cingjing Farm and 3km to Meifeng Farm.
en.about_card3_d: Bird watching, alpine plants, and forest bathing for the highest quality relaxation.
en.about_construction: [ New official website under construction, with features to be added gradually. The online booking form is currently available. Please check your email for a response after submission! ]
en.room_8_f: Features: Equipped with two separate bathrooms
en.room_fam_f: Features: Most spacious room with premium natural light
en.extra_bed_notice: ※ Please note extra bed limits. To maintain quality, we cannot exceed the maximum capacity.
en.def_weekend_d: : Saturday, Long holidays, and National holidays
en.remit_1: Deposit required: 1/2 of total rate.
en.remit_2: Please complete transfer within 【3 Days】 and confirm via phone/email.
en.remit_3: Please provide: Room type, Date, Name, Phone.
en.remit_4: The villa reserves the right to cancel unconfirmed bookings after 5 PM.
en.refund_law: In accordance with Nantou County Government regulations:
en.food_br_d: A complimentary Western breakfast is prepared for all staying guests.
en.food_din_notice: ※ Pre-order required at least one day before check-in
en.tra_r1_d: National Highway 3 → Wufeng System to Highway 6 → End of Highway turn left → Route 14 (toward Wushe) → Cingjing Farm → Route 14A (12.4K) turn right and go uphill → Starry House.
en.tra_r2_d: Exit Highway 3 at Caotun → Take Route 14 (Zhongtan Hwy) → Pass Caotun, Guoxing, Puli → Continue toward Wushe/Cingjing.
en.tra_bus_d: Take the bus from Taichung HSR / Train Station to Puli, then transfer toward Cingjing Farm.
en.tra_pickup_d: Some buses (Taiwan Trip) go direct. Please get off at 'Songgang Station' and call us for pickup.
en.footer_slogan: Highest View in Cingjing ‧ Starry House
en.footer_addr: No. 96, Bowang Ln., Ren’ai Township, Nantou
en.footer_copy: © 2026 Starry House | New site under construction
en.book_subtitle: We will contact you as soon as possible to confirm your booking.
en.book_privacy: By submitting, you agree to our booking rules and privacy policy.
en.book_notes_placeholder: e.g., food allergies, shuttle service needed, etc.
